ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "resp_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Geographic identifier for the region */,
  "crrall" REAL /* Current Recovery Rate (All) - a measure of overall economic recovery */,
  "crrint" REAL /* Current Recovery Interest Rate (All) - the current interest rate affecting overall economic recovery */,
  "drrall" REAL /* Delayed Recovery Rate (All) - a measure of overall delayed economic recovery */,
  "drrint" REAL /* Delayed Recovery Interest Rate (All) - the delayed interest rate affecting overall economic recovery */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator being measured */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is real-time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-100) */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being validated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-100) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the data validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the data quality */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "quality_dimension" TEXT /* Specific dimension of data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy ended */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Geographic identifier for the region where the policy is applied */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy */,
  "impact_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the policy's impact */,
  "responsible_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy impact entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic policy */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the policy on the indicator (0-100) */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was assessed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the policy impact */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the impact score (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
